items.title: UK government bolsters antiviral supply for hantavirus
items.summary: The UK has received a supply of favipiravir from the Japanese government to aid Hantavirus preparedness.

items.title: VERTANICAL’s VER-01 gains FDA breakthrough status for low back pain
items.summary: VERTANICAL has received breakthrough therapy designation from the US FDA for VER-01, its investigational non-opioid treatment for chronic low back pain.

items.title: Regeneron signs $2.32bn deal with Parabilis for Helicon conjugates
items.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals has signed a $2.32bn deal with Parabilis Medicines to develop therapeutic candidates, with a focus on AHCs.

items.title: Vaccine void means current Ebola outbreak declared international emergency
items.summary: The WHO has classed this outbreak as “extraordinary” due to the lack of therapeutic options and epidemiological trends.

items.title: Tracy Beth Høeg ousted from FDA in wider senior leadership shakeup
items.summary: The wider US HHS is going through a leadership upheaval, as Republicans aim to keep voters on side amid the looming midterm elections.
